sourceContext.title: Jasper Tan - The Systems Architect | AI, Automation & Business Strategy
sourceContext.description: Former Marine, MBA, and AI innovator. 10+ AI applications built, 150% profit increases delivered. Systems-building expertise for the future.
sourceContext.pageText: T H E J T E From Marine Corps to AI Architect Where discipline meets innovation Systems Thinking Meets Execution Discipline forged in the Marines. Innovation driven by AI. Impact measured in results. 10+ AI Applications 7+ AR/VR Projects 175+ Marines Led MBA Graduate The Crisis Age 21: Facing Deportation Living in the U.S. since age 6, facing removal from the only home I knew. Deportation Notice at 21 Joined the U.S. Marine Corps The Turning Point Chose to serve the nation that raised me. Earned citizenship through dedication and sacrifice. Citizenship Through Service United States Marine Corps Leadership Under Fire As a Sergeant Led Marines through multiple deployments. Inspired others in high stakes environments. 7 Years Active Duty MBA Graduate First in Family Combined military leadership with business strategy at University of Arizona, Eller College of Management. MBA University of Arizona AI Systems Architect Building the Future 10+ AI applications built. 150% profit increases delivered. Systems driven innovation at scale. 10+ AI Apps | 150% Growth The Journey Scroll to explore S u c c e s s i s d e t e r m i n e d b y w h a t w e d o t o d a y N o t w h a t w e p l a n t o d o t o m o r r o w — Jasper Tan Former Marine turned Systems Architect. Built 10+ AI applications and 6 AR/VR projects. Delivered 150% profit increases through systematic innovation and disciplined execution. The Systems Framework 9 steps to transform vision into reality. Used to build 10+ AI applications, lead 175 Marines, and deliver 150% profit increases. Clarity Vision & Mission S.M.A.R.T Goals Specific, Measurable, Achievable Consistency Daily Execution Discipline Do It Anyway Habits Automate Success Reduce Friction Eliminate Obstacles Preparation Plan for Success Assessment Measure & Adjust Iteration Continuous Improvement Ready to apply this framework to your business? Let's Build Your System Innovation Portfolio The AI Arsenal 10+ production ready AI applications spanning consumer tech, enterprise solutions, transportation, and automation. Each built with cutting edge technology and systems thinking. 🤖 Enterprise AI Natalia: SuperAgent Autonomous AI assistant that sees, hears, understands, schedules meetings, makesphone calls, and manages workflows. 24/7 availability, zero downtime. 90% Query Resolution Tech Stack Multimodal AI Realtime Voice & Text chat Computer Vision RAG MCP N8N View Demo → 💕 Social AI DateMeAI AI powered dating profile optimizer that analyzes photos and bios to maximize match potential. Increased user matches by 3X. 3X Match Rate Increase Tech Stack Flutter AI Multimodal Multimodal AI Realtime Voice & Text chat Firebase View Demo → 📚 Enterprise AI SuperRAG Advanced Retrieval Augmented Generation system for intelligent document search and question answering across massive knowledge bases. 95% Accuracy Rate Tech Stack React Python OpenAI Embeddings LangChain View Demo → 📊 Business Intelligence Client Insight Agent AI powered customer analysis platform that identifies trends, sentiment, and actionable insights from customer interactions. 75% Faster Insights Tech Stack React 3 separeate LLM Supabase n8n GSuite View Demo → 🎯 Market Research BizValid AI Automated market research platform to validate your business idea. 10X Research Speed Tech Stack React GPT 4 Data Analytics n8n OpenAi View Demo → 📄 HR Tech GetMeAJobAi AI resume screening system that matches candidates to job requirements with 90% accuracy, reducing hiring time by 60%. 60% Faster Hiring Tech Stack Flutter OpenAI Firebase React Node.js View Demo → 🗣️ Ai Development ChatCreateMe Build Your AI Chatbot through conversation. Configure your custom AI chatbot by simply talking to our AI. Choose your LLM, add avatars, integrate with n8n, Gmail, MCP, RAG systems, and more. 5X Content Output Tech Stack Fullstack Creator React Kubernetes Realtime Voice + Text chat View Demo → 🚗 Transportation Tech PD: Your Personal Driver Like Uber, but better. You get your own personal driver Better than Uber Tech Stack React Native Google Maps API Real time Matching Payment Processing Watch Demo → 🏠 IoT & Smart Home IOT Escalade Voice activated Cadillac Escalade. Full interation with home automation and Siri. 100+ Device Integrations Tech Stack IoT Voice Recognition Raspberry Pi ESP32 Watch Demo → ← Scroll to explore → 01001000 01100101 01101100 01101100 01101111 01010111 01101111 01110010 01101100 01100100 01000001 01001001 00100000 01010011 01111001 01110011 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110011 Systems Thinking in Motion Every element moves with purpose. Every layer serves the system. This is how complex problems become elegant solutions. Demonstrate multi dimensional thinking Extended Reality AR/VR Showcase 6 augmented and virtual reality projects pushing the boundaries of immersive technology. From retail to gaming to enterprise solutions. Retail AR AR Product Identifier Point your phone at any product to get instant information, reviews, and price comp...
